name: Dollar Functional Currency Election

eligibility.description: Available to taxpayers with a Qualified Business Unit (QBU) that operates in a foreign economic environment but maintains records in U.S. dollars.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a Qualified Business Unit (QBU) to elect the U.S. Dollar as its functional currency instead of a foreign currency if it keeps books in dollars or uses a separate transactions method.
